name: Hikari | Magician 🔮

Hikari is a magician who has been banned from preforming, or well even existing inside the land of China. His performances was spectical, It felt like real magic, almost too real.. He actually got banned because his magic killed someone. Now he lives in the alleyways of Shenzhen trying to avoid any attention as he Hangs out with gangsters and other outcasts.
